title: Sword_Vip
description: resource pack designed to be suitable for PvP. (active version 1.8.9- 1.12.2) support HeroMC.net Vietnam
body:
This is a unique resource pack called (Sword_Vip)(One 1)
___________________________________________________________________________________
-With a unique Sword item structure, it gives players a refreshing experience.

-With simple drawn details, the game becomes smoother.

🔰item animation effects ~~~

🔰great design that women love~~~

🔰suitably adjusted sound~~~

🔰create a strong feeling for each hit~~~

🔰this resource pack is only suitable for PvP~~~
